displayTitle: Jedi Quest #1: The Way of the Apprentice
synopsis: Obi-Wan Kenobi is working hard training Anakin Skywalker to one day become a Jedi Knight. But Anakin will face the ultimate test when a mission gone awry separates the master and apprentice, forcing Anakin to figure things out without Obi-Wan’s guidance.
title: Jedi Quest #1: The Way of the Apprentice
